englishDefinitions: Small clumps of lint, dust, and hair that gather in socks, or playful name for tiny fuzzy balls made from socks.
persianTranslation: پرز و کرکِ جمع‌شده در جوراب
توده‌های پرز و مو در جوراب
examples: I pulled a sock bunny out of the laundry basket.
After a week, the socks had collected a lot of sock bunnies.
She laughed and called the lint in her sock a sock bunny.
